mapper.sql: case when n.node_name like '%土壤%' then '土壤传感器' when n.node_name like '%环境%' then '环境监测设备' when n.node_name like '%温室%' then '温室监测设备' when n.node_name like '%光照%' then '光照监测设备' else '其他设备' end
convert(a.handle_by using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_general_ci = convert(t.user_name using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_general_ci

sql.if: and convert(n.create_by using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_general_ci like concat('%', #{farmName}, '%')
and convert(n.plot_location using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_general_ci like concat('%', #{plotLocation}, '%')
and convert(() using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_general_ci = #{deviceType}
and convert(n.node_code using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_general_ci like concat('%', #{nodeCode}, '%')

mapper.select: select count(*) as totalCount, sum(case when r.status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as pendingCount, sum(case when r.status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as processingCount, sum(case when r.status = '2' then 1 else 0 end) as doneCount, sum(case when r.status = '3' then 1 else 0 end) as cancelledCount, sum(case when r.status = '0' and timestampdiff(hour, r.create_time, now()) > 24 then 1 when r.status = '1' and timestampdiff(hour, coalesce(r.accepted_at, r.create_time), now()) > 72 then 1 else 0 end) as timeoutCount, round(avg(case when r.accepted_at is not null then timestampdiff(minute, r.create_time, r.accepted_at) end) / 60, 2) as avgResponseHours, round(avg(case when r.status = '2' and r.repair_finish_at is not null and r.accepted_at is not null then timestampdiff(minute, r.accepted_at, r.repair_finish_at) when r.status = '2' and r.repair_finish_at is not null then timestampdiff(minute, r.create_time, r.repair_finish_at) end) / 60, 2) as avgCompleteHours, 0 as timeoutRate from repair_request r left join agri_sensor_node n on r.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on r.technician_id = t.user_id where r.del_flag = '0'

select date_format(r.create_time, '${groupFormat}') as label, count(*) as totalCount, sum(case when r.status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as pendingCount, sum(case when r.status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as processingCount, sum(case when r.status = '2' then 1 else 0 end) as doneCount, sum(case when r.status = '3' then 1 else 0 end) as cancelledCount, sum(case when r.status = '0' and timestampdiff(hour, r.create_time, now()) > 24 then 1 when r.status = '1' and timestampdiff(hour, coalesce(r.accepted_at, r.create_time), now()) > 72 then 1 else 0 end) as timeoutCount from repair_request r left join agri_sensor_node n on r.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on r.technician_id = t.user_id where r.del_flag = '0'
group by date_format(r.create_time, '${groupFormat}') order by min(r.create_time)

select as label, count(*) as count from repair_request r left join agri_sensor_node n on r.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on r.technician_id = t.user_id where r.del_flag = '0'
group by order by count desc

select coalesce(nullif(r.title, ''), '未分类') as label, count(*) as count from repair_request r left join agri_sensor_node n on r.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on r.technician_id = t.user_id where r.del_flag = '0'
group by coalesce(nullif(r.title, ''), '未分类') order by count desc limit 10

select coalesce(t.nick_name, t.user_name, '未指派') as label, count(*) as count, sum(case when r.status = '2' then 1 else 0 end) as doneCount, round(sum(case when r.status = '2' then 1 else 0 end) * 100 / count(*), 2) as ratio, round(avg(case when r.status = '2' and r.repair_finish_at is not null and r.accepted_at is not null then timestampdiff(minute, r.accepted_at, r.repair_finish_at) when r.status = '2' and r.repair_finish_at is not null then timestampdiff(minute, r.create_time, r.repair_finish_at) end) / 60, 2) as avgHours from repair_request r left join agri_sensor_node n on r.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on r.technician_id = t.user_id where r.del_flag = '0' and r.technician_id is not null
group by coalesce(t.nick_name, t.user_name, '未指派') order by count desc limit 10

select coalesce(n.node_name, '未关联设备') as label, coalesce(n.node_code, '--') as code, count(*) as count from repair_request r left join agri_sensor_node n on r.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on r.technician_id = t.user_id where r.del_flag = '0'
group by coalesce(n.node_name, '未关联设备'), coalesce(n.node_code, '--') order by count desc limit 10

select count(*) as totalCount, sum(case when a.status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as unconfirmedCount, sum(case when a.status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as confirmedCount, 0 as processingCount, 0 as recoveredCount, 0 as falsePositiveCount, round(avg(case when a.status = '1' and a.handle_time is not null then timestampdiff(minute, a.alarm_time, a.handle_time) end) / 60, 2) as avgConfirmHours, null as avgRecoverHours from agri_alarm_record a left join agri_sensor_node n on a.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on where 1 = 1

select date_format(a.alarm_time, '${groupFormat}') as label, count(*) as totalCount, sum(case when a.status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as unconfirmedCount, sum(case when a.status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as confirmedCount, 0 as recoveredCount, 0 as falsePositiveCount from agri_alarm_record a left join agri_sensor_node n on a.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on where 1 = 1
group by date_format(a.alarm_time, '${groupFormat}') order by min(a.alarm_time)

select case when a.alarm_level = '1' then '严重' when a.alarm_level = '2' then '警告' else '未知' end as label, a.alarm_level as code, count(*) as count from agri_alarm_record a left join agri_sensor_node n on a.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on where 1 = 1
group by a.alarm_level order by a.alarm_level

select as label, count(*) as count from agri_alarm_record a left join agri_sensor_node n on a.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on where 1 = 1
group by order by count desc

select coalesce(nullif(n.plot_location, ''), '未设置区域') as label, count(*) as count from agri_alarm_record a left join agri_sensor_node n on a.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on where 1 = 1
group by coalesce(nullif(n.plot_location, ''), '未设置区域') order by count desc limit 10

select coalesce(n.node_name, '未关联设备') as label, coalesce(n.node_code, '--') as code, count(*) as count from agri_alarm_record a left join agri_sensor_node n on a.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on where 1 = 1
group by coalesce(n.node_name, '未关联设备'), coalesce(n.node_code, '--') order by count desc limit 10

select x.label, x.code, sum(x.repeatCount) as count from ( select coalesce(n.node_name, '未关联设备') as label, coalesce(n.node_code, '--') as code, greatest(count(*) - 1, 0) as repeatCount from agri_alarm_record a left join agri_sensor_node n on a.node_id = n.node_id left join sys_user t on where 1 = 1
group by a.node_id, a.metric_code, date_format(a.alarm_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H') ) x where x.repeatCount > 0 group by x.label, x.code order by count desc limit 10
select distinct create_by as label, create_by as value from agri_sensor_node where del_flag = '0' and create_by is not null and create_by != '' order by create_by
select distinct plot_location as label, plot_location as value from agri_sensor_node where del_flag = '0' and plot_location is not null and plot_location != '' order by plot_location
select x.label, x.value from ( select distinct as label, as value from agri_sensor_node n where n.del_flag = '0' ) x order by x.label
select distinct node_code as label, node_code as value from agri_sensor_node where del_flag = '0' and node_code is not null and node_code != '' order by node_code

select user_name as value, case when nick_name is not null and nick_name != '' then concat(nick_name, ' (', user_name, ')') else user_name end as label from sys_user where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' order by user_name
